title: Surveillance and Data Analytics | COVID-19 | CDC
text:
ess dashboard shows respiratory virus data from CDC's NVSN. 
The National Respiratory and Enteric Virus Surveillance System (NREVSS) 
NREVSS is a laboratory-based system that monitors respiratory and enteric virus activity. 
Variants and Genomic Surveillance 
CDC uses genomic surveillance to identify and track SARS-CoV-2 variants.

Covid 
COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) is a disease caused by a virus named SARS-CoV-2. It can be very contagious and spreads quickly.
